articles.title: Host of ratings and viewership data show this World Cup to be a winner across the United States
articles.description:
The joy and entertainment that the World Cup has delivered in a broad way has been reflected in staggering viewership numbers for its broadcast partners.

The post Host of ratings and viewership data show this World Cup to be a winner across the United States appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: World Cup viewership numbers surged, reflecting strong interest in Boston and nationwide.
Broadcast partners reported record ratings, with millions tuning in across the United States.
Increased local engagement and community events expected as Boston residents celebrate the tournament.

articles.title: Healey announces tax credit awards to build almost 700 new homes in six Mass. cities
articles.description:
Historic buildings and former mills are set to become hundreds of new residences in Fall River, Lawrence, Lowell, Pittsfield, Taunton, and Worcester.

The post Healey announces tax credit awards to build almost 700 new homes in six Mass. cities appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Healey announces tax credits to develop nearly 700 new homes across six Massachusetts cities.
Historic buildings in Fall River, Lawrence, Lowell, Pittsfield, Taunton, and Worcester will be transformed.
This initiative aims to address housing shortages and improve local communities for residents.

articles.title: FBI arrests Mass. man in armed bank robberies in NH, NJ
articles.description:
A SWAT team arrested Joseph Sawyer, 52, in upstate New York on Wednesday in connection with two bank robberies last month.

The post FBI arrests Mass. man in armed bank robberies in NH, NJ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: FBI arrested Joseph Sawyer, 52, for armed bank robberies in New Hampshire and New Jersey.
Sawyer was apprehended by a SWAT team in upstate New York on Wednesday.
The arrests may enhance safety for Boston residents concerned about regional crime.
